summary: Soundboard recording captures a moving reggae‑dub style Scarlet Begonias → Fire on the Mountain, praised as a one‑of‑a‑kind rendition.
review: The sole fan review lauds this set for its emotionally powerful Scarlet Begonias into Fire on the Mountain segue, describing it as almost a reggae dub version that left a lasting impression. Although no explicit technical comments are made, the file’s SBD designation suggests a clear and well‑balanced soundboard source.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one highly positive review (5 stars) highlighting an exceptional performance; recording quality is inferred as good from the SBD label but not directly confirmed.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific audio comments; assumed clear and balanced due to soundboard (SBD) source and fixed processing.

standout_songs: Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain
show_quality.setlist_flow: Review focuses solely on the Scarlet Begonias → Fire on the Mountain segue as the highlight.
